rules.name: Semantic model definition.pbism version
rules.description: Use the reserved Definition part name to read definition.pbism and assert the semantic model definition version.

rules.name: Semantic model database.tmdl declares compatibility level
rules.description: Use the reserved Database part name with filetextsearchcount to validate TMDL content using a regular expression.

rules.name: Semantic model model.tmdl declares a culture
rules.description: Use the reserved Model part name with filetextsearchcount to ensure the TMDL model file contains a culture declaration.

rules.name: Semantic model expressions.tmdl is optional
rules.description: Use the reserved Expressions part name and allow simple models where definition/expressions.tmdl is absent.

rules.name: Semantic model relationships.tmdl is optional
rules.description: Use the reserved Relationships part name and allow models with no explicit relationships file.

rules.name: Semantic model dataSources.tmdl is optional
rules.description: Use the reserved DataSources part name and allow models that do not materialize definition/dataSources.tmdl.

rules.name: Semantic model functions.tmdl is optional
rules.description: Use the reserved Functions part name and allow models that do not define DAX user defined functions.

rules.name: Semantic model tables collection includes Inventory
rules.description: Use the reserved Tables part name to inspect the TMDL table files and assert that Inventory.tmdl exists.

rules.name: Semantic model table files start with a table declaration
rules.description: Iterate the reserved Tables part name and use filetextsearchcount with a regular expression against each current .tmdl file.

rules.name: Semantic model cultures collection includes fr-FR
rules.description: Use the reserved Cultures part name to inspect culture TMDL files and assert that fr-FR.tmdl exists.

rules.name: Semantic model culture files start with a cultureInfo declaration
rules.description: Iterate the reserved Cultures part name and use filetextsearchcount with a regular expression against each current .tmdl file.

rules.name: Semantic model roles collection can be empty
rules.description: Use the reserved Roles part name to show how to inspect an optional TMDL collection and count its members.

rules.name: Semantic model perspectives collection can be empty
rules.description: Use the reserved Perspectives part name to show how to inspect an optional TMDL collection and count its members.
